title: Remote RS232 Error Response
description:
Remote RS232 Error Response

Error Response

When the Controller can not receive the remote command correctly, the error response is shown in the following format.

NAK
		Command
		Error Code
		ETX
		BCC

1Byte	1Byte	2Byte	1Byte	1Byte

NAK ： &H06

ETX ： &H03

BCC ： Checksum of sent and received data

XOR value from the command to ETX per 1Byte

Format: ![Remote command],[Error code] terminator

Error Code	Contents

10	Remote
		 command does not begin with $

11	Remote
		 command is wrong

		Login is not executed

12	Remote
		 command format is wrong

13	Login
		 command password is wrong

14	Specified
		 number to acquire is out of range

		(Less than 1 or more than 100)

		Number to acquire is omitted

		Specified a string parameter

15	Parameter
		 does not exist

		Dimension of parameter is wrong

		Element out of range is called

16	BCC is
		 wrong

19	Request
		 time out

20	Controller
		 is not ready

21	Cannot
		 execute since the Execute is running

99	System
		 error

		Communication error

Communication Sequence
